clues: User cannot reach a website they need for work.
Other websites like Google and internal IP addresses load perfectly fine.
Using the 'ping' command returns 'could not find host'.
Other users on the same subnet are not experiencing this issue.
Running 'ipconfig /all' shows a manual, external server instead of the internal one.
